title: Rose Gold Fabric
description: Vanilla+ mod that adds rose gold - Naturally spawning ore. This material has almost same properties like mining speed as gold but is more durable!
body:
![header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbb79be78c77feccd08404997a4479f019d487aa.png)

No wonder why nobody is using golden tools. They break apart after few minutes of mining! Man, do I have a solution for you! Rose Gold combines fast mining with moderate durability. Mod also adds few building blocks made from this material! Perfect for Vanilla+ gameplay.
# Guide
## Finding rose gold ore
Rose gold ore is rare ore that generates under Y level 22 in **_lush caves_**. It has 2 types: Normal and Deepslate.
It can be mined with at least iron tools.

![Rose gold ore found in lush caves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7ae1715f2bc778acd72302704ac6089da7def90.png)
## Crafting
All crafting recipes for tools, armor and blocks are like in Vanilla minecraft.

![Rose Golden Axe crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afbed1d15fe274cb968d7a684643db3cf40c4b1f.png)
![Rose Golden Apple crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40ab34d60585e2db6c835114a85a6f4c0171473f.png)
![Rose Golden Carrot crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef6c42b4edb482a3223617f53beccb10bc50a132.png)
